methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $500M last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 5 same-sector + same-stage peers in Climate & Energy. Range: $120M - $5.0B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Climate & Bio-Manufacturing

private.name: Commonwealth Fusion Systems
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series B), post-money $5B+

private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series B), post-money $400M

data.narrative:
Pano AI is a Series B climate and energy technology company seeking valuation at the $500M+ post-money level. The comparable universe consists of five private peers at identical stage and sector (Commonwealth Fusion Systems, Sage Geosystems, Reverion, CarbonCapture Inc., and Cemvita Factory) alongside one public comparable, spanning a wide range from $120M to $5.0B.

Two valuation methods triangulate to a range. Stage-progression analysis applies a 1.9x step-up multiplier to the last post-money valuation of $500M, implying $950M. Peer-median analysis across the five same-stage, same-sector comparables yields $310M, with the peer set distributed between $120M (floor) and $5.0B (Commonwealth Fusion Systems as outlier). The wide dispersion reflects material heterogeneity in technology maturity and capital requirements within the climate-tech sector.

Triangulation across both methods supports a valuation range of $264M to $1.1B, with a median of $630M. The $500M+ current valuation sits within the lower portion of this range, anchored more closely to peer-median than to stage-progression. Key uncertainties include the comparability of Commonwealth Fusion Systems' $5.0B valuation to Pano AI's specific technology and market position, and whether peer-median properly reflects investor conviction in this particular frontier-tech segment. Resolution of technology and commercialization risk will likely prove the primary driver of any revaluation in the near term.
